summary: Auto-growing conversation textarea with submit, stop, error, and extensible attachment or channel-tool regions.
useWhen: A conversation accepts multi-line text and needs Enter-to-submit with a streaming stop action.
avoidWhen: The text is a conventional form field submitted with unrelated fields.
accessibility: Always provide a localized textarea label and submit or stop action names.
Shift plus Enter inserts a newline while Enter submits non-empty content.
Streaming and error states remain perceivable without relying on icon shape alone.
states: The owner controls draft value and transport state; the composer emits intent without performing transport.
The channel owner selects submitIntent when brand is not appropriate; agent experiences may opt into ai while person-to-person messaging keeps the brand default.
responsiveBehavior: The field grows to a bounded height and then scrolls internally.
